title: Blank Discs
description: A simple mod that add colorable and craftable blank discs (To be used with henkelmax's AudioPlayer mod for example)
body:
This simple mod add blank discs that will play no music,on top of that they are craftable and colorable !

This mod was created for mods that replace the audio of music discs, that way you can easily get a disk and customize it to your will !

---

### How to :

**Craft a disc :**

![blank_disc_crafting_recipe](https://i.imgur.com/KCDTBr5.png)

**Dye a disc :**

![blank_disc_dye](https://i.imgur.com/0N3ZYFZ.png)
(This recipe is Shapeless)

### Colors :

You can actually dye the disk in :

- Black
- White
- Red
- Orange
- Yellow
- Green
- Cyan
- Light Blue
- Blue
- Purple
- Pink

---

I recommand using henkelmax's AudioPlayer mod to add a purpose to this mod :

> ### For Fabric :
>Just install the AudioPlayer mod : https://modrinth.com/mod/audioplayer
and the Simple Voice Chat mod : https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat

> ### For Forge :
> Follow the step of the fabric installation (Yes, download both the fabric jars and ignore the Simple Voice Chat Forge version) , and install the Forgified Fabric Api : https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api and Sinytra Connector mod : https://modrinth.com/mod/connector

Follow the tutorial on the AudioPlayer mod page to add music on the discs !

---

This mod was made using MCCreator.
